# SBA Houston District Office Resource Partner Context

## Resource summary
The SBA local-assistance result for 77084 includes the Houston District Office location and contact context alongside resource partner results.

## SBA Houston District Office listed in the 77084 result
- Address: 8701 S. Gessner Dr., Suite 1200, Houston, TX 77074.
- Phone: 713-773-6500.

## BOSS use
Use this when the client asks about SBA local office context or when a resource partner issue needs an SBA district-office route. For ordinary advising, route first to the SBDC/SCORE/WBC/VBOC/APEX resource partner as appropriate.
